suggestions.text: We are only intrested in the paid consults
in the hive.data_model.doc_consult_orders we only consider order_created_flag = 1 orders. these are the orders for which the user has completed the payment for
Free consultations are where order_category = 'free' or 'freefollowup'
To identify a diagxconsult order use this logic on doc_consult_metrics table : Distinct(case(startsWith([coupon_code], "CON") AND [placed_discounted_mrp] = 0, [order_id]))
Free orders are free orders + free followup

MOM - Month on Month
WOW - Week over week
